prose: The frontier orbital gap of ethylene was computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier 'standard') in the gas phase with PySCF. The calculation was based on a user-supplied geometry file (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz). SCF converged in 6 cycles, and the HOMO–LUMO gap was found to be 7.43572 eV using Koopmans' approximation. The result is considered trustworthy (no warnings reported).
